consumer_notes: This export is derived only from verified_rules.json.
Review, rejected, and not_used rules are not executable constraints.
Map consumers should display review_blockers as warnings, not apply them as zoning logic.

map_layer_requirements.description: Building footprint polygons for height, storey, separation, and coverage limits.

conditions: measured from grade at a side property line shared with a parcel designated with a low density residential district
between the closest façade of the main residential building to the closest façade of a Backyard Suite. 10P2019
(a) in the R-C1L, R-C1Ls, R-C1, R-C1s, R-C1N, R-1, R-1s and 24P2018 R-1N Districts; or (b) when located on a parcel with a parcel width less than 13.0 metres

constraints.applies_to: balcony attached to a Backyard Suite
constraints.condition: project into a required 10P2019 setback area from a property line shared with a street or a lane
constraints.source_quote: A balcony attached to a Backyard Suite may project into a required 10P2019 setback area from a property line shared with a street or a lane to a minimum setback of 0.6 metres from the property line.
constraints.felt_popup_sentence: balcony attached to a Backyard Suite: setback for setback must be at least 0.6 m when project into a required 10P2019 setback area from a property line shared with a street or a lane.

constraints.source_quote: minimum building setback from a rear property line is: (a) 1.5 metres for any portion of the building used as a Backyard Suite
constraints.felt_popup_sentence: backyard suite: setback for setback must be at least 1.5 m when rear property line.

constraints.source_quote: the maximum building height for a Backyard Suite is 7.5 metres
constraints.felt_popup_sentence: Backyard Suite: height for height must be no more than 7.5 m when Unless otherwise referenced in subsection (4.1).

constraints.condition: between the closest façade of the main residential building to the closest façade of a Backyard Suite. 10P2019

constraints.felt_popup_sentence: Backyard Suite: building separation for building separation must be at least 5.0 m when between the closest façade of the main residential building to the closest façade of a Backyard Suite. 10P2019.

constraints.condition: measured from grade at a side property line shared with a parcel designated with a low density residential district
constraints.source_quote: (4.1) The maximum building height for a Backyard Suite is: 5.0 metres measured from grade at a side property line shared with a parcel designated with a low density residential district
constraints.felt_popup_sentence: Backyard Suite: height for height must be no more than 5.0 m when measured from grade at a side property line shared with a parcel designated with a low density residential district.

constraints.condition: (a) in the R-C1L, R-C1Ls, R-C1, R-C1s, R-C1N, R-1, R-1s and 24P2018 R-1N Districts; or (b) when located on a parcel with a parcel width less than 13.0 metres
constraints.exception: excluding any area covered by stairways and landings
constraints.source_quote: (2) Except as otherwise stated in subsections (2.1) and (3), the maximum 23P2016 floor area of a Secondary Suite, excluding any area covered by stairways and landings, is 100.0 square metres: (a) in the R-C1L, R-C1Ls, R-C1, R-C1s, R-C1N, R-1, R-1s and 24P2018 R-1N Districts; or (b) when located on a parcel with a parcel width less than 13.0 metres

constraints.exception: excluding any area covered by stairways and internal landings not exceeding 2.5 square metres
constraints.source_quote: (5) The maximum floor area of a Backyard Suite, excluding any area covered by stairways and internal landings not exceeding 2.5 square metres, is 75.0 square metres
constraints.felt_popup_sentence: Backyard Suite: floor area for floor area must be no more than 75.0 m2.
